reasoning: Article 25 of GDPR emphasizes data protection by design and by default, which can be mapped to several Kubernetes security practices. Ensuring least privilege access aligns with RBAC enforcement. Network policies that default to deny ingress protect data by design. Encryption of secrets at rest ensures data protection by default. Enabling audit logging supports accountability and transparency, key principles of GDPR.
title: Article 25 Data protection by design and by default
